privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically defined satellite parameters provided directly in the task description. It was verified that the expected output script path '/home/ga/Documents/missions/tdrss_sim.script', the report path '/home/ga/GMAT_output/tdrss_access_report.txt', the target satellite 'Aura_Next', and the three observer TDRS satellites exactly match both the explicit prompt instructions and the verifier.py logic constraints. The LEO SMA (7083.14 km) and GEO SMA (42164.17 km) parameters are also explicitly defined and verified against the instructions.
